goal: Compare learning rate warmup strategies (linear warmup vs cosine warmup vs no warmup) on DistilBERT SST-2 classification. 3 seeds (42, 123, 456), 3 epochs, 2000 training samples, paired t-test.
direction: Compare learning rate warmup strategies (linear warmup vs cosine warmup vs no warmup) on DistilBERT SST-2 classification. 3 seeds (42, 123, 456), 3 epochs, 2000 training samples, paired t-test.
